text: Good housekeeping is considered necessary for preventing accidents at sea, what is true regarding same?

options.text: A) Securing tools after work is not needed as we need them next day also
B) Engine room should be locked, when no one is inside
C) Wearing dirty clothes in a galley or mess room should be avoided

explanation: Maintaining high standards of housekeeping is vital for safety. Ensuring that personal spaces, especially mess rooms and galleys, remain clean prevents contamination and hazards, while proper conduct keeps the ship safe.
